isolation.testMethod: uv run pytest + ruff + mypy + gh + git

VAL-CB-001.notes: Test confirms response includes symbol (str), name (str), decimals (int) alongside token, chain, and bucket when metadata resolves.

VAL-CB-002.notes: Test confirms response returns 200 with bucket when metadata fetch raises an exception. Metadata fields are absent (not null).

VAL-CB-003.notes: Test confirms multiple concurrent requests for the same token are serialized via per-token asyncio.Lock. All return 200 with correct bucket.

VAL-CB-004.notes: Schema regression tests confirm required fields (token, chain, bucket) always present, total fields between 3-6, no unexpected fields.

VAL-CB-005.notes: All existing error paths unchanged. Per-token lock does not interfere with validation or error paths. 9/9 targeted tests passed.

VAL-CB-006.evidence: evidence/check-bucket-upgrade/all-assertions/full-suite-summary.txt — 248 passed, 0 failed; ruff check: All checks passed!; ruff format: 15 files already formatted; mypy: Success: no issues found in 12 source files
VAL-CB-006.notes: Full test suite (248 tests), ruff check, ruff format --check, and mypy src/ all clean. No errors or warnings from tools.

VAL-CB-007.evidence: evidence/check-bucket-upgrade/all-assertions/pr-status.txt — PR #122 'feat: add per-token lock and metadata to check_bucket' OPEN targeting main; git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD returns 'feat/check-bucket-metadata-and-dedup' (not 'main')
VAL-CB-007.notes: PR #122 exists and is OPEN targeting main. However, the repo is still checked out to 'feat/check-bucket-metadata-and-dedup' rather than 'main'. The assertion requires 'git checkout main && git pull' after PR creation, which has not been done.

summary: Tested 7 assertions: 6 passed, 1 failed. VAL-CB-001 through VAL-CB-006 all pass — metadata fields, metadata failure handling, per-token lock, schema compatibility, error cases, and full test suite/lint are all working correctly. VAL-CB-007 fails because the repo is still on the feature branch 'feat/check-bucket-metadata-and-dedup' rather than 'main' after PR creation. PR #122 exists and is open, but the parent agent still needs to run 'git checkout main && git pull'.
